tool:
ghcr.io/zjmorgan/subhkl:main
mkdir out ;
## Rename all input files to correct extensions mv "$scan" "$scan.element_identifier" ;
#if $algod.mask.useMask: mv "$algod.mask.maskFile" "$algod.mask.maskFile.element_identifier" ; #end if
#if $algod.algo == 'peak_local_max': python -m subhkl.io.parser finder "$scan.element_identifier" $instrument --output-filename out/finder.h5 --create-visualizations --show-progress --wavelength-min $wavelengthMin #--wavelength-max $wavelengthMax --region-growth-distance-threshold $growthDistance --region-growth-minimum-sigma $growthSigma --region-growth-minimum-intensity $growthIntensity --region-growth-maximum-pixel-radius $growthRadius --peak-center-box-size $growthIntensity --peak-smoothing-window-size $peakWindow --peak-minimum-pixels $peakMin --peak-minimum-signal-to-noise $peakSignal --peak-pixel-outlier-threshold $peakThreshold --finder-algorithm $algod.algo --peak-local-max-min-pixel-distance $algod.pixelDistance --peak-local-max-min-relative-intensity $algod.relativeIntensity --peak-local-max-normalization $algod.normalization #end if #if $algod.algo == 'sparse_rbf': python -m subhkl.io.parser finder "$scan.element_identifier" $instrument --output-filename out/finder.h5 --create-visualizations --show-progress --wavelength-min $wavelengthMin --wavelength-max $wavelengthMax --region-growth-distance-threshold $growthDistance --region-growth-minimum-sigma $growthSigma --region-growth-minimum-intensity $growthIntensity --region-growth-maximum-pixel-radius $growthRadius --peak-center-box-size $growthIntensity --peak-smoothing-window-size $peakWindow --peak-minimum-pixels $peakMin --peak-minimum-signal-to-noise $peakSignal --peak-pixel-outlier-threshold $peakThreshold --finder-algorithm $algod.algo --show-steps $algod.rbfShow --sparse-rbf-alpha $algod.alpha --sparse-rbf-gamma $algod.gamma --sparse-rbf-min-sigma $algod.minSigma --sparse-rbf-max-sigma $algod.maxSigma --sparse-rbf-max-peaks $algod.maxPeaks --sparse-rbf-chunk-size $algod.chunk --sparse-rbf-tile-rows $algod.tileRows --sparse-rbf-tile-cols $algod.tileCols #end if #if $algod.algo == 'thresholding': #if $algod.mask.useMask: python -m subhkl.io.parser finder "$scan.element_identifier" $instrument --output-filename out/finder.h5 --create-visualizations --show-progress --wavelength-min $wavelengthMin --wavelength-max $wavelengthMax --region-growth-distance-threshold $growthDistance --region-growth-minimum-sigma $growthSigma --region-growth-minimum-intensity $growthIntensity --region-growth-maximum-pixel-radius $growthRadius --peak-center-box-size $peakBox --peak-smoothing-window-size $peakWindow --peak-minimum-pixels $peakMin --peak-minimum-signal-to-noise $peakSignal --peak-pixel-outlier-threshold $peakThreshold --finder-algorithm $algod.algo --thresholding-noise-cutoff-quantile $algod.noise --thresholding-min-peak-dist-pixels $algod.peakDist --thresholding-mask-rel-erosion-radius $algod.erosion --thresholding-blur-kernel-sigma $algod.blur --thresholding-open-kernel-size-pixels $algod.kernelSize --thresholding-mask-file "$algod.mask.maskFile.element_identifier" #else: python -m subhkl.io.parser finder "$scan.element_identifier" $instrument --output-filename out/finder.h5 --create-visualizations --show-progress --wavelength-min $wavelengthMin --wavelength-max $wavelengthMax --region-growth-distance-threshold $growthDistance --region-growth-minimum-sigma $growthSigma --region-growth-minimum-intensity $growthIntensity --region-growth-maximum-pixel-radius $growthRadius --peak-center-box-size $peakBox --peak-smoothing-window-size $peakWindow --peak-minimum-pixels $peakMin --peak-minimum-signal-to-noise $peakSignal --peak-pixel-outlier-threshold $peakThreshold --finder-algorithm $algod.algo --thresholding-noise-cutoff-quantile $algod.noise --thresholding-min-peak-dist-pixels $algod.peakDist --thresholding-mask-rel-erosion-radius $algod.erosion --thresholding-blur-kernel-sigma $algod.blur --thresholding-open-kernel-size-pixels $algod.kernelSize #end if #end if
IMAGINE IMAGINE-X MANDI
Peak Local Max Sparse RBF Thresholding
>
Calculates peak indices.
